str_23C2442B: The sea waves under the blue of the night sky gently washed over the coastal stones.
str_0890BCB7: The cold air scratched my throat with every deep breath.
str_4499B7B9: I am alone again in this crisp, icy snow.
str_5A80CF43: A silhouette moved towards me straight out of the water.
str_24BB8473: The closer he came, the clearer the outlines of his face became.
str_756EB118: Why do you make the sea troubled, Alice?
str_C6FD1524: Is this a dream? Tell me this is a dream...
str_0D09E1A9: You know, there are so many legends about the sea in the world.
str_A545589B: This expanse of sea is a gateway to the underworld. A gateway through which the souls of the dead enter and exit.
str_1985D0BF: To the songs of the sirens, the most terrible of murderers, they cannot find peace and only occasionally appear on the shores to look upon the land again.
str_2AADFEF8: They say the gates open in summer, and it is then that you can see the dead, pale and exhausted by torment.
str_C0B7FFFB: But it's not the dead souls you should fear; they are merely prisoners.
str_033B55C0: Hostages, restless, those who died not their own death.
str_058CBB41: You should fear the sirens, who come out for new victims.
str_3301700D: They not only kill but also become masters of souls.
str_F3BB9B62: And those, the restless ones, follow them into this world, forced to watch...
str_57E6E8C9: A siren is a sign of death.
str_3D98A1D7: It doesn't matter what they say. They might even forget who they are.
str_56E48963: But the evil is inside them.
str_0AA958D9: Even the most desperate love of this world will not hold it back.
str_D2228BAE: Why are you telling me all this?
str_2710C432: This water takes away the most precious thing the restless have – memory.
str_F24A2825: Aren't the dead those who have lost their memory? The knowledge of who they are?
str_0121E967: My gaze was stolen by the night sky.
str_4ED4BAF2: That sound... Waves crashing against the rocks.
str_6615D165: Ah... That look... The flickering look of midnight.
str_7C44D33A: I opened my eyes in my apartment.
str_84D8FD12: 7.113 It's worth getting closer to the officer
str_AC3A83C3: I opened my eyes in the apartment.
str_1D88E2B8: Reality again pulled me away from these thoughts.
str_96394B9F: Because today is the last day of the week.
str_B3691564: And that means I could be charged.
str_54BA5D83: It's already noon, and I have little time left.
str_12B127BA: A message from Edwin appeared on my mobile: "I left the dress for the evening under your door."
str_780CF20F: I got up to find the package.
str_59D43D62: Yes, there was a dress. I'd better put it on now. If I go outside, I might not have time to come back.
str_172BF3AC: But what do I do until the party at the club?
str_7028A99B: Stay in the apartment until evening.
str_CA9A8223: I decided it was better to do nothing.
str_9CC309E7: Sometimes inaction is the best option.
str_0EF9BD99: I hope that's the case for me.
str_1BE1D384: After lazing in bed and flipping through magazines, I slowly headed to the club.
str_B10EE957: Thoughts swirled in my head that this wasn't right.
str_5DC56D79: I can't give in to Mark.
str_F2D78AB9: But on the other hand – today is the last day the officer will be looking for evidence of others' involvement in Miranda's murder.
str_ADE85812: And I have to find anything at all.
str_B63AA431: I have to get information from Mark.
str_78D21B58: So, I'll go and try to do something about it.
str_47932BC6: I cautiously entered the officer's office.
str_52215E40: He was standing by the window, looking somewhere into the distance of the streets.
str_6DAD07F0: Hello! I hope you came to visit me?
str_2044CD9C: Yes, I wanted to see you.
str_AB6CBCD3: How are you? I know you're worried, but still...
str_06054C78: I wanted to say that yesterday I saw something strange again.
str_C20570B2: Mark was buying drugs from the old man who scared me that night.
str_666F85B8: I remember you were afraid that Mark gave you drugs that night.
str_1CE8EDB4: You tried to point out Mark's involvement in the murder.
str_078E8D2A: I remember you took drugs that night.
str_37D31225: There's definitely something wrong with him and that old man...
str_3E43192F: I'll try to look into this angle.
str_F5FD0013: And also. His ex-girlfriend has disappeared.
str_F1A6A762: And you remember what I told you – he was cruel to that girl. And the marks on Miranda's neck. So many coincidences.
str_FAFD71C6: And you remember what I told you – he was cruel to that girl and to me.
str_461BA0B6: You're right, this is very important information.
str_ADAFD7E5: I wanted to tell you something.
str_6A0277B8: That guy you mentioned, it seems he disappeared last summer.
str_1BECEE3C: What? But I saw him here!
str_DCAEB1B7: That's a different country, so I can't get all the information. But hopefully, they'll send it to me.
str_8C915F9E: His face. It seemed familiar to me.
str_021E7072: I was there last summer, maybe I saw him.
str_18A3194F: That's strange. As soon as I get information about him, I'll let you know.
str_3763632E: I need to pull myself together.
str_D507027F: If there was enough evidence against Mark, he'd already be behind bars.
str_3B022F48: But no, I have to make this video.
str_0880E19F: Maybe I should tell the officer what Mark asked me to do?
str_0DBBA0A3: Mark asked me to make a certain video in exchange for information.
str_91CE6799: He thinks there's something between us. And he asked me to film our intimacy.
str_6E433B97: I don't know, he has many quirks.
str_5A862B48: But he said he would talk to me about all these strange things.
str_9EBC4CB0: I doubt he would tell you anything.
str_2B056408: Maybe, but I'm not in a position to choose right now. Anything would be useful to me.
str_9C580F1C: Alice, I work for the police. I can't agree to this.
str_85451724: I know. I just wanted to be honest with you.
str_C8F153F7: Charles looked into my eyes and ran his hand along my cheek.
str_49C87946: I buried my head in his chest.
str_60D252D1: Right now, he is my only chance for salvation, and I need him.
str_89C54DE0: I wrapped my fingers around his neck, and we merged in a kiss.
str_A367E815: Sorry, but I have a lot of work today. You know how important it is.
str_7B8E625D: I understand, I just want to be with you.
str_B58C8EA6: After spending some time alone with the officer, I gathered my things and headed for the exit of the station.
str_8DC4FDEF: Let's just forget ourselves for a while. I want you.
str_AE5E8388: After these words, I saw a fire in his eyes. He definitely wants me here and now.
str_AC2B0DF0: Pressing closer to him, I felt that tension.
str_BF8535EF: Ever since our first meeting, I've thought only of you.
str_41A1ED8C: My head spun from the wild craving for him.
str_752877B4: Without saying a word, I turned my back to him.
str_D901FBC1: Everything around seemed to spark from the tension.
str_DF8ECEE5: His hands glided softly along my back.
str_5104D49D: Excitement overwhelmed me when I felt his warmth.
str_8DA93854: I gripped the desk tightly, moving in rhythm with him.
str_8322987C: Closing my eyes, I drowned in this pleasure.
str_667AFF29: Until the very end of this frenzy, I felt like I was in paradise.
str_4BC0B630: I turned on the camera on my phone and discreetly placed it on one of the shelves.
str_A32CEDE5: Running my hand over the folders on the shelf, I turned to the officer.
str_62FC72A9: So many cases. Did you solve them all?
str_8FF0B215: It is. But someone has to do it.
str_81811239: You know, next to you I feel safe.
str_66CCCDC6: What are you getting at, Alice?
str_EFCC3536: Just that I want to be closer to you.
str_AB7B7722: Too bad I don't have a video for Mark. But maybe try my luck anyway?
str_72E5E158: I wrote to him, saying I would only show the video in person.
str_D636C7CC: And yes, he replied to my message. Mark is waiting for me on the beach in 30 minutes.
str_647B6CA8: Now I need to send the video to Mark.
str_59C53EAA: Having sent it, my heart seemed to freeze with fear. What am I doing?
str_9B332508: Mark replied to my message. He'll be waiting for me on the beach in 30 minutes.
str_F4B5B2D5: I walked slowly along the beach.
str_45CFC744: A heavy burden hung on my heart.
str_742F6267: Come on! Hurry up and get over here.
str_6B1AA4B2: To hell with that. I demand a show!
str_DD46A166: I have to convince him to talk to me.
str_2C135BBC: I need to find out at least something.
str_5EFFD738: Do you think I'm that stupid?
str_B7416CB3: Say at least something so I can believe you!
str_2CB64D56: Fine, what do you want to know?
str_0CDB987A: What were you really doing that night?
str_CD5B754D: What connects you to the old man?
str_1CA5114C: What's going on with you and the girl from the club?
str_24C5FAE2: Drank, danced, secluded myself with Miranda on the beach, listened to your arguing, and left you alone. Then slept.
str_EEFB555D: Why didn't you say this right away?
str_EF137E2A: You'd better say thank you, because me keeping quiet helped you.
str_94AAB00A: After all, you were the last one with her.
str_E5E38E71: And why should I believe you?
str_6CF4D11F: I don't care. That's your problem.
str_F7297D5F: I buy certain things from him.
str_85A03CDA: He sells pills and some other stuff. Various videos, erotic in nature.
str_35555292: Because the people in the videos don't know they're being filmed. That's the most interesting part.
str_A1777BF3: Nothing special, just a regular fling.
str_402EFEC4: We fooled around a couple of times. Maybe I did cross the line.
str_C09043E3: Sometimes I don't notice it myself.
str_65C6018B: I don't know, she disappeared. But I'm not involved in that.
str_4D06480F: You didn't really think I'd make it for you, did you? Sick pervert.
str_8093EBD5: Fine, then I'll tell the officer the truth, that I saw you on the beach that night!
str_EB381032: And deal with that however you want, sweetheart.
str_125DDE49: Mark grabbed my neck and pressed me against one of the rocks.
str_0B916BDA: What are you going to do now?
str_ADA262F6: I started desperately calling for help.
str_DE7A7E8B: Do you think anyone is here? That someone will help you?
str_EDBA06D0: To hell with it, I don't like pathetic people like you.
str_3F259193: Mark let go of me and stepped back.
str_22B44129: I fell to the ground and began greedily gasping for air.
str_D010CABC: And Mark's figure disappeared over the horizon.
str_5C27C5D0: I started feeling around for rocks to hit him with.
str_0CDFF36A: When something finally came to hand, I swung and hit Mark on the head.
str_35E08932: But he only choked me harder.
str_19CC375A: I continued hitting him on the head furiously.
str_46981CE3:
Blow after blow.
Blow after blow.
str_D624BE8F: I didn't notice how my hands ended up covered in blood.
str_985ADFDD: Mark fell to his knees in front of me, and his eyes began to grow dim.
str_BB844DEF: Streams of blood colored the water scarlet and immediately rushed into the sea.
str_638B629B: Mark lay on the sand at my feet. He wasn't breathing.
str_02FC25D8: My legs carried me forward on their own.
str_BDB3FA83: I stepped over his lifeless body as if it weren't there and rushed into the distance.
str_7AF461F3: I couldn't utter a single word.
str_FE32685F: I handed the phone to Mark, and he forwarded the video to himself.
str_56005E90: Just tell me, why do you need it?

str_CF24BA63: Isn't there enough of that on the internet?
str_10F2675E: Do you really think your pathetic attempts are that interesting to watch?

str_3EBABA5E: His close attention is bad for my business.

str_79C175C1: Too late to think about that!
str_080FC8F2: How do I fix this now?
str_87B62674: Try to take his phone by force.
str_504647C9: Please, Mark. The officer is the only one trying to help me.
str_D1DBD3D5: I can't do that to him!
str_8B0DBBBA: If you tell him about the video, he won't help me!
str_B89978AD: You and your girlfriend should have understood that every action has consequences.
str_AA6B1945: Get out of my way, girl!
str_F713860C: No, I won't let you do this!
str_C0185E1C: I tried to snatch Mark's phone from his hands.
str_6DB71642: But I failed, it only made him angrier.
str_06C317F7: So I've come to this place.

str_F2DDB454: The officer was standing by the window, looking into the distance of the streets. I think I know what to tell him.
str_547058C3: And you know, I told you – he was cruel to that girl. And the marks on Miranda's neck. So many coincidences.
str_930944A3: And you know, I told you – he was cruel to that girl and to me.
str_632C381E: Sorry, Alice. I have to work.
str_48F2911A: I'm just scared because of all this.
str_E78A74FD: I would like to comfort you, Alice.
str_2EDC1CBB: You have a good relationship with the officer!
str_DAE05304: Alice, I really need to work right now.
str_BE412CF7: You don't have a good enough relationship with the officer!
str_C7665DA4: After saying goodbye to the officer, I headed to the club.
str_1DCEC7B1: I think I've become afraid of the night.
str_50C6EE3D: I need to do what I promised.
str_893AB0AD: I started pulling out the drawers from the dresser.
str_867F22DF: Come on, it has to be here somewhere.
str_EFED64E8: The box was in the very bottom drawer.
str_8E5B1158: It was tightly sealed with tape.
str_22FB68B6: I took a photo and sent it to Mark.
str_4F182EDE: Suddenly, I heard the sound of keys in the lock.
str_1A58635E: I barely managed to hide the box before Edwin entered.
str_333D56B4: Oh, nothing, just looking for a towel.

str_4A904AB5: Thank you, thank you for the dress.

str_46D76237: Well, you know, I also wanted to take a walk on the beach.

str_7590F2ED: It would be fair to him.
str_83D831AC: You know, I have to tell you something.

str_8CDED949: I handed Edwin the box I had just tried to steal.
str_22908E12: He didn't take his eyes off it for a few seconds, and then looked at me reproachfully.
str_484B5283: And why would he want that?
str_F07EB916: I don't know. Don't you believe me?

str_B846E391: I was overcome by the bitterness of his distrust.

str_C26BC257: I silently headed for the exit.

str_2229D541: See you at the club then.

str_3172A0FD: But I had to do it.
str_FC268CDA: I have to find something to use against Mark!
str_2A488AAA: I walked slowly along the beach.
str_F28999C7: To hell with it. This isn't a dinner party.
str_B2ABB92D: If he finds out I deceived him, I definitely won't get anything.
str_465D8EF9: Do you think I'm that stupid?
str_F1C6D0A4: After all, you were the last one with her.
str_73B31BAB: No, but I really needed it.

str_BF2FD8FC: Yes, a theft that you committed.

str_0B9B8DDD: And you won't say what's on it?
str_667B279D: Enough, where's the flash drive, Alice?
str_CD182723: I don't have the flash drive.
str_368ADBAB: Mark was in the living room.
str_F98C7A67: After all, yesterday I decided to go through with it – meeting him.
str_BF6ECB71: I need to get at least something useful out of him, whatever it takes.
str_13F85CFB: He was flipping through some magazines, slowly, but without any interest.
str_89A3896C: So you decided to come after all.
str_0E200E2B: What's the point of words? In the end, they're just sounds.
str_C18767D4: I need to stall for time.
str_A02BA90D: I need to get at least something out of him.
str_DC83A8D4: You give me the truth. And I'll give you the action.
str_762CB1F1: What do you want to know, Alice?
str_71E7CB57: But know this, you only get one question.
str_50998A41: Do you know who killed Miranda?
str_7EA33D81: No, that night I left you too early to have witnessed anything.
str_2392F811: We had a good time – her and me.
str_3C7C67D1: Yes, and then you came. And I left you.
str_D895B337: He sells pills and various erotic videos.
str_4A05735F: He and I have common ground, a partnership. But I have nothing more to say.

str_5434E646: Yes. It is a game, and I can see it.
str_F62A3C5A: The very one Miranda gave me back then.
str_F2FACD52: I took the same one that night.
str_F4A87514: I already don't understand who I am.
str_022533E8: I don't want to lose myself again.
str_500DA5AB: Because I told you the truth, and you refused to act.
str_D5B56C4F: I don't want to spend what might be my last moments of freedom like this – with you.
str_04509688: I slowly ran my hand over Mark's palm, taking the pill.
str_75549E0C: A strange premonition settled in my head.
str_302A1032: Looking him straight in the eyes, I swallowed it.
str_7593ADA6: Leaving Mark, I felt completely empty.
str_30DDFDAF: My legs carried me along the already familiar route on their own.
